titleStmt.title: SII 41.456: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 456. (A.R. No. 670 of 1905.) Tīrttamalai, Harur Taluk, Salem District. On the rock to the west of the central shrine of the Tīrthagirīśvara temple on the hill at Tīrttamalai.

summary.p: Gift of three villages by Rājēntra-Chōḻa-Viriyūr-nāḍuḍaiyān alias Uttama-Chōḻa-Puṟamalaināḍāḷvān. The donor repaired the temple and constructed the muka-maṇḍapa. The temple is called Tīrttamalai-Uḍaiya-Mahādēvar in Puṟamalai-nāḍu a sub-division of Tagaḍūr-nāḍu, in Nigarilichōḻa-maṇḍalam. The gifted villages were Kuṟumatali, Avvaḍi-mangalam, and Alaiyūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūrvva deśamumkaṅkaiyum kiṭāramum koṇṭa kopparakeśari paṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrāje
ntracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu Irupattonpatāvatu ṉikarili coḻamaṇṭalattut takaṭūrnāṭṭu
p puṟamalai nāṭṭu tīrttamalaiyuṭaiya mahādevar koyil putukkuvittu mukamaṇṭapa
bhamum meṭuppitten kaṟkaṭaivaiyriyanāna viyaḷaṉ maṟapaṭai kaṇṭanā
ṉa Irājentiracoḻaviriyūr nāṭuṭaiyānāna Uttamacoḻappuṟa
malai nāṭāḻvāṉeṉ tirttamalai mādevarkku tirunantāviḷakku Iraṇṭum
tirumaṭaippaḷḷip puṟamāka kuṭuttavūr kuṟumataliyum Avvaṭimaṅkalamum Alaimalai
nāṭṭil Alaiyūrum kuṭutteṉ Uttamacoḻappuṟamalai nāṭāḻvāneṉ Itu Aḻipāṉ
Digital edition of SII 41.456 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
